title: Professional email: apology and solution
subtitle: Apologize and propose a repair.
overview: Professional apologies need responsibility and action.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Tomaremos medidas para que no vuelva a ocurrir.
We will take measures so that it does not happen again.

items.es: Le pido disculpas por el retraso en la respuesta.
items.en: I apologize for the delay in the response.

items.es: El error se debió a un problema de coordinación interna.
items.en: The error was due to an internal coordination problem.

items.es: Para solucionarlo, le enviaremos la información actualizada hoy mismo.
items.en: To solve it, we will send you the updated information today.

items.es: Entendemos las molestias que esto ha causado.
items.en: We understand the inconvenience this has caused.

items.es: Tomaremos medidas para que no vuelva a ocurrir.
items.en: We will take measures so that it does not happen again.
